libraryPreparationPreflight.agent_guidance: For nativeTest/native-image run coverage on io.vertx:vertx-web-client:5.0.1, add runtime system properties equivalent to: -Dsun.misc.unsafe.memory.access=allow and -Dio.netty.tryReflectionSetAccessible=true. Tests can use Vertx.vertx(), WebClient.create(...), and a loopback HttpServer; no external service is needed.

input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #7998 [Automation] native-image run fails for io.vertx:vertx-web-client:5.0.1; label=fails-native-image-run; body_chars=8015

risks: OAuth2WebClient is part of the artifact API but depends on optional io.vertx:vertx-auth-oauth2; avoid OAuth2-specific tests unless that optional dependency is intentionally added.
The unsafe-access properties are motivated by Java 25/native-image current-defaults with Netty 4.2.x; local Gradle and Native Image verification remain authoritative.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: Core Web Client coverage is self-contained with an in-process Vert.x HTTP server, but Vert.x 5.0.1 resolves Netty 4.2.2.Final and needs the same Java 25 native-runtime unsafe-access properties already used for 5.0.0.
